segments.text: Actually does a good job of pretty much hitting underneath for most characters.
Yeah, like you said, Samus is very tall.
Sisqui trying to hang at ledge, trying to come back.
The spot dodge, knowing that the up tilt was probably coming,
ultimately ends up not using it.

full_text: Actually does a good job of pretty much hitting underneath for most characters. Yeah, like you said, Samus is very tall. Sisqui trying to hang at ledge, trying to come back. The spot dodge, knowing that the up tilt was probably coming, ultimately ends up not using it.
